scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @ebs/document-ir build && pnpm --filter @ebs/ground-truth-schema build && pnpm --filter @ebs/diff-engine build && pnpm --filter @ebs/storage build && pnpm --filter @ebs/parsing build && pnpm --filter @ebs/suggestions build && pnpm --filter @ebs/extraction-scorecard build && pnpm --filter @ebs/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @ebs/job-runner build && pnpm --filter @ebs/domain-profiles build && pnpm --filter @ebs/ui-components build
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter @ebs/api build && pnpm --filter @ebs/workers build && pnpm --filter @ebs/web build
